name: feature.slides.nodes
description: Slides canvas producer node pack (ADR 0153 Phase 1). The `render` node emits a typed `canvas.slides` artifact — a constrained deck { title?, theme?, slides[] } — that flows through the run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders inline in the chat artifact workbench's slides renderer. Constrained typed JSON, never executable code; pure transform; replay-safe (output recorded, never re-derived).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render slide deck
nodes.description: Emit a `canvas.slides` artifact. Inputs: { title?, theme?, slides: [{ layout, title?, subtitle?, bullets?, attribution?, imageUrl?, notes? }] } (or `deck` as the whole object, or `source` as its JSON). Output: a typed canvas.slides artifact (contentTrust: model-authored structured JSON). Pure transform.
